item.title: Power producer Boralex conducting strategic review of alternatives
item.description: Company says board’s decision to form a special committee will not necessarily result in a transaction

item.title: Manitoba government set to deliver budget amid health care, affordability concerns
item.description: Province has promised a balanced budget by 2027-28 but has so far missed its annual targets

item.description: Fintech, where Peter Mandelson and Harvey Schwartz were board members, is given £2mn penalty by Bank of England

item.description: Agricultural land prices extended a more than three-decade upward trend despite trade uncertainty and higher input costs

item.description: The choices in dealing with market volatility depend on your circumstances

item.description: Deal would create $40-billion beauty group uniting Jean Paul Gaultier, Clinique brands

item.description: GICs, stocks and other investments are taxed differently, including if they’re held in registered or non-registered accounts

item.description: Initial public offerings have come to a virtual standstill since war in the Middle East broke out, but private equity is busy making deals elsewhere

item.description: First prescription limited to maximum of £21 as part of wide-ranging CMA reforms

item.description: Japanese manufacturer has struggled since swooping for UK rival Pilkington two decades ago

item.description: Any ceasefire negotiations must include a humanitarian carve-out for such shipments

item.description: Now comes the hard part for David Ellison’s audacious deal to combine Paramount and Warner Bros Discovery

item.description: FCA to unveil scheme to compensate millions of customers of allegedly mis-sold car loans next week

item.description: Donald Trump’s unpopular immigration crackdown has made links to the Peter Thiel-backed company a liability for candidates

item.description: Disruption to power supplies and shipping bottlenecks have affected key sources of production in Gulf

item.title: Indonesia targets investment banks for ‘alleged capital market crimes’
item.description: Regulators probe underwriters UOB, Mirae and Shinhan after January’s plunge in stock prices

item.title: AI could be a blockbuster — just not for film companies
item.description: Film studios may find that the advantages they reap from investing in new technology get competed away

item.description: Roland Busch warns against throttling ‘innovation speed for the sake of creating sovereignty’

item.description: Hummingbird to put $800mn in funds to work after lucrative early bets on the likes of Kraken and Lovable

item.description: A ‘palate cleanser’ after chains and charms, bohemian cord necklaces have become the style set’s go-to accessory

item.title: US must suspend Nvidia AI chip exports to China, senators say
item.description: Lawmakers call for commerce department to suspend licences that let company send advanced semiconductors to south-east Asia

item.title: EU and Australia sign free trade pact and announce a new defense partnership
item.description: Both countries seek to diversify trading networks and reduce economic reliance on China and exposure to uncertain U.S. tariffs

item.description: Rate of solar radiation stored in the planet has accelerated over past two decades

item.description: In its final form, the institution could include as many as 40 countries, all NATO members or their allies

item.description: From steep discounts to a year of free mortgage payments, builders bet promotions will get skeptics off the fence

item.description: Development charges are adding significant costs to purchasing newly built homes

item.description: According to the 2025 Changemaker Wellbeing Index, even modest investments in basic HR structure could significantly boost employee advocacy across the non-profit sector
